root.question: What do you need help with?

answers.label: How do I create an estimate?
How do I send it to a client?

estimates_create_ans.answer: Go to Estimates → Create Estimate. Add line items with descriptions, quantities, and unit prices. JobFlow will auto-calculate subtotals and tax if enabled.

estimates_send_ans.answer: Open the estimate and click 'Send'. Your client will receive a link to a branded estimate page where they can review and accept or decline.

estimates_accepted_ans.answer: When a client accepts an estimate, a job is automatically created and linked to it. You can then schedule the job and convert it to an invoice.

estimates_pdf_ans.answer: Yes — clients can download a PDF from their estimate view link. You can also download it from the estimate detail page.

answers.label: How do I create an invoice?
How do I send a reminder?

invoices_create_ans.answer: Go to Invoices → Create Invoice. You can create one from scratch or convert an accepted estimate directly into an invoice.

invoices_payment_ans.answer: Connect Stripe or Square in Settings → Payments. Once connected, clients can pay directly from the invoice link using a card.

invoices_remind_ans.answer: Open the invoice and click 'Send Reminder'. You can also set up automatic follow-up sequences in Settings → Follow-Ups.

clients_root.question: What do you need to know about clients?

answers.label: How do I add a client?
Can I import clients from a spreadsheet?

clients_add_ans.answer: Go to Clients → Add Client. Fill in the name, email, and contact details. Clients are linked to all their jobs, invoices, and estimates.

clients_import_ans.answer: Yes — go to Clients → Import. Upload a CSV with the required columns and JobFlow will walk you through matching the fields.

scheduling_root.question: What do you need help with scheduling?

answers.label: How do I schedule a job?
How do I assign jobs to employees?

scheduling_job_ans.answer: Go to Jobs → open a job → click 'Schedule'. Set the start and end time. The job will appear on the Schedule view for all team members.

scheduling_assign_ans.answer: Open the job and go to the Assignments tab. Search for an employee and add them. They'll receive a notification about the assigned job.

account_root.question: What account setting do you need help with?

answers.label: How do I set up my branding?
How do I manage my subscription?

account_branding_ans.answer: Go to Settings → Company. Upload your logo, set your brand colors, and add a tagline. These will appear on all client-facing documents.

account_billing_ans.answer: Go to Settings → Billing to view your plan, upgrade, or cancel. Billing is handled securely through Stripe.
